user.title: Set up Smartdome Heat Control
user.description:
First select the **controller type** for the heating pump controller:

- **Thermostat (climate entity)** – You have a smart heating circuit controller (e.g. Lambdatronic, Fröling, Viessmann). Smartdome sends target temperatures to the climate entity to activate or deactivate the heating. The boost delta value is used to temporarily raise the target temperature to switch the heating circuit on. An optional temperature sensor enables additional monitoring.
- **Smart switch** – You have no heating circuit controller, only a smart on/off switch (e.g. Shelly, Sonoff). Smartdome switches it directly on or off — no temperature sensor required, no boost delta needed.

If you have no heating pump controller, leave the field empty — Smartdome will then only control the individual radiator valves.

data.outdoor_temp_cutoff: Switch off heating above outdoor temperature

rooms.title: Confirm rooms
rooms.description: {room_count} rooms were detected: {room_names}. Confirm to finish setup.

init.title: Smartdome Heat Control
init.description: Choose what you want to edit.

global.title: Global settings
global.description:
Select the **controller type** for the heating pump controller:

- **Thermostat (climate entity)** – Smartdome controls a heating circuit controller or climate entity via target temperature. Smartdome raises the target temperature by the boost delta value to switch the heating circuit on, and lowers it again to switch it off. An optional temperature sensor enables monitoring.
- **Smart switch** – Smartdome switches a switch directly on (heating on) or off (heating off). No temperature sensor required, no boost delta needed — control is purely binary.

If no heating pump controller is present, simply leave the field empty.

data.outdoor_temp_cutoff: Switch off heating above outdoor temperature

rooms_list.title: Manage rooms
rooms_list.description: Select a room to edit or create a new one.

edit_room.title: Edit room
edit_room.description:
Edit radiator valve, room temperature sensor, temperatures, and schedule for this room.

**No smart radiator valve?** Leave the field empty — the room will operate in **sensor-only mode**: it contributes to the central heating signal but cannot be individually controlled.

add_room.title: Add room
add_room.description:
Create a new room manually.

**No smart radiator valve?** Leave the field empty — the room will operate in **sensor-only mode**: it contributes to the central heating signal but cannot be individually controlled.
